notes: Two-pose layout matches the photo and the mantle/fin silhouette is recognisable, but arms collapse into clumped masses with noisy trace clutter rather than the clean separated arms and sucker rings expected in an FAO plate.
specific_issues: arms merged into undifferentiated clumps in both views
tentacular clubs not resolved as distinct shapes
no ring suckers drawn along arms
top dorsal view is missing an eye
jittery broken outline with many small squiggle artifacts
interior of mantle cluttered with photo-trace fragments instead of restrained stipple
fin/mantle junction edge is fragmented rather than continuous
bottom view arms fused into a single shape with stripe artifacts
